creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
So:

it seems that the mplayer leaves an unusable state to the X-Video
extension:

I can correct it manually by x11/xvattr:

#> xvattr -a XV_AUTOPAINT_COLORKEY -v 1
Found Xv 2.2
XV_AUTOPAINT_COLORKEY set to 1



After that the vlc player woks fine. 

This should be done automatically by mplayer (not by user).
